================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 47 D7 1F F7
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x182B
Reflected CC   : 0x07
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 0

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x182B
ReflectedCC  : 0x07
PayloadLen   : 0

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x182B

[PAYLOAD HEX]

[RETURN VALUE]

[BINARY DATA]
